violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Bag of red onions on floor in back prep area.
Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Front 2 door cooler at 49F.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Remove cardboard from lower shelf of back prep cooler and remove rust and paint...or replace.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors in kitchen.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floor tiles in kitchen are loose and need rep[laced.
